description: 100% stacked bar chart of synthetic Likert survey responses by question, colored on a diverging scale from Strongly disagree (rust) through Neutral (grey) to Strongly agree (teal), with white separators between segments.

title.text: Survey responses by question (SYNTHETIC demo data)
title.subtitle: Likert data suits a diverging stacked bar: a diverging palette runs from disagree (rust) through neutral (grey) to agree (teal).

usermeta.source: Source: Synthetic demonstration data — not real NCDPI survey results.
